versions.name: Camp Kenya
versions.address: Savage Wilderness Adventure Camp, Sagana, Kirinyaga, Kenya (about 3 hours from Nairobi)
versions.summary: Transatlantic Council resident camp held at the Savage Wilderness Adventure Camp near Sagana, Kenya, about three hours from Nairobi on the Tana River. It offers six youth programs spanning a Cub Scout camp, Trail to First Class for new Scouts, Scouts BSA merit badges, a high-adventure track, a Mount Kenya trek, and Sea Scouting, alongside a family program and adult training. Activities include whitewater rafting, kayaking, stand-up paddleboarding, rock climbing, archery, wilderness survival, and a safari adventure.

sources.citation: Savage Wilderness Adventure Camp, Sagana (Kirinyaga), Kenya; coordinates via OpenStreetMap / Nominatim

provenance.notes: Added by hand from the Transatlantic Council camp page; camp-finder never captured this overseas camp, so it was missing from the map. Held at the Savage Wilderness Adventure Camp near Sagana (~3 hours from Nairobi); coordinates geocoded to the Savage Wilderness property. A multi-program winter camp (Cub through Sea Scout, plus a Mount Kenya high-adventure trek). Operational dates and fees are deliberately excluded (they stay on the council site).
